topics.title: Bravo's 'In The City' Spinoff Premieres May 19 — Amanda + West Get a Show, Kyle Gets a Divorce
topics.hook: Amanda Batula and West Wilson just landed a Bravo spinoff two months after her marriage ended. Kyle Cooke is out here doing a post-divorce social media audit of who he still follows. The relationship content industrial complex has officially eaten itself.
topics.angle: Bravo is rewarding the drama with a platform. The 'perfect' marriage collapsed on camera and somehow turned into more content. What does it say about how we value relationships that perform well vs. relationships that actually hold? LLMA angle: build for life, not for the cameras.
topics.buzz: Very High — In The City premiere announced April 7, Amanda/West relationship confirmed March 31, Kyle's social media activity story broke April 30. Reunion airing soon.

topics.title: Jamie Laing + Sophie Habboo Break Silence on 'Lavender Marriage' Claims (April 30, 2026)
topics.hook: The Made in Chelsea stars just responded to viral speculation that their marriage is a lavender marriage — and their answer is more interesting than the accusation. The obsession with 'catching' lavender marriages reveals a lot about what people actually want from relationships.
topics.angle: Why is everyone so invested in whether this couple is 'real'? Because lavender marriage has become a mirror. People aren't looking for tea — they're looking for permission. The Laing/Habboo case shows how lavender marriage went from a slur to an aspiration.
topics.buzz: High — PinkNews covered April 30, trending in UK and LGBT+ communities, lots of TikTok discussion.

topics.title: Platonic Family TikTok Goes Viral (9.9M Views) — Mom Plans to Divorce + Move In With Best Friend
topics.hook: A TikTok mom revealed she and her best friend have a pact to get divorced, move in together, and raise their kids as a platonic family unit. 9.9M views. 1M likes. The comment section is mostly 'where do I sign.'
topics.angle: This isn't radicalism. This is people being honest about what they actually need from a partnership and building it. The comment section sentiment is the story — millions of people quietly agreeing they want this and had no idea it was an option.
topics.buzz: High — Scary Mommy covered, TikTok viral, Reddit discussions active.

pop_culture_hook: Summer House spinoff 'In The City' (May 19 premiere) — Amanda Batula + West Wilson get a Bravo show while Kyle Cooke audits his Instagram follows post-divorce
